top_signals.title: Shipowners Assess Hormuz-Transit Risk as US-Iran Deal Crumbles
top_signals.summary: Shipowners painted a mixed picture of their willingness to continue transiting the Strait of Hormuz in the hours after President Donald Trump said the US ceasefire with Iran is “over.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bowman, Opening Remarks on Sound Practices for Artificial Intelligence
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Financial Stability Board Virtual Outreach Event
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
